mapper.select:
{ CALL ${schema}..USP_MOBILE_DELIVERY_LIST_DETAIL_HAPPYCALL_SAVE_TALK ( #{instMobileMId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendComplete ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userid ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{messageType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{profile ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reserveDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmTlkMsg ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tmplId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{message ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) }
